imo_dongyi_wei: Dongyi Wei won gold at the International Mathematical Olympiad in 2009, representing China. IMO gold medalists are the top ~50 high-school mathematics competitors worldwide each year. Many IMO medalists go on to careers in academic mathematics, computer science, finance, or technology; a substantial fraction obtain mathematics PhDs at top research universities.

Many IMO medalists go on to careers in academic mathematics, computer science, finance, or technology; a substantial fraction obtain mathematics PhDs at top research universities.
